items.name: utils
items.title: cn
items.description: Class-name join utility used by every component.

items.name: async-view
items.title: AsyncView
items.description: the four-state async renderer every data screen needs: placeholder (idle) → loading → success/error.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: a small count or status pill (notification counts, live state).

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: a D-pad-focusable action.

items.name: callout
items.title: Callout
items.description: a world-object annotation: a small anchor at a screen point with a vertical leader line up to an emitted label (no box — additive translates the card to line + type).

items.name: compass
items.title: Compass
items.description: a heading rose that keeps North pointing at real north while a fixed top marker shows where you face.

items.name: confirm
items.title: Confirm
items.description: a decision screen: a prompt + a two-button action bar (confirm / cancel).

items.name: cue
items.title: Cue
items.description: a caption / hint line: what to do next, or a transient status ("Listening…").

items.name: deck
items.title: Deck
items.description: a horizontal paged flow (wizard / onboarding).

items.name: direction-arrow
items.title: DirectionArrow
items.description: points toward a real-world `bearing` (degrees, 0 = up/N, clockwise).

items.name: error-state
items.title: ErrorState
items.description: a recoverable error screen: optional glyph + title + message + a retry action.

items.name: glow-icon
items.title: GlowIcon
items.description: wraps a line-icon SVG and applies the 2-tier luminance rule (apple-feel §7): inert = near-white, `active` = phosphor green with a faint glow.

items.name: heading
items.title: Heading
items.description: a screen/section title with an optional eyebrow label above it.

items.name: launcher
items.title: Launcher
items.description: the app grid: the entry screen for a multi-app surface.

items.name: list
items.title: List
items.description: a vertical stack of focusable rows (watchOS list spirit).

items.name: meter
items.title: Meter
items.description: a bounded ring gauge for a level (battery, signal, intensity), as opposed to <Progress> which tracks task completion.

items.name: pin
items.title: Pin
items.description: a world-anchored waypoint marker: a ring + dot at a screen point with the name and distance stacked above.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: emitted progress, two shapes: - "linear" a continuous bar (also covers countdown: feed a decreasing value and a time label).

items.name: quick-reply-chips
items.title: QuickReplyChips
items.description: tappable canned replies (the comms job; there is no keyboard on the lens — text is voice).

items.name: readout
items.title: Readout
items.description: a single-value complication: label + value (+ optional unit).

items.name: reticle
items.title: Reticle
items.description: an aim-to-select target: four corner brackets framing the gaze center.

items.name: screen
items.title: Screen
items.description: the on-lens layout shell: a status region (block-start), a centered stage (the one task), and a cue region (block-end).

items.name: segmented
items.title: Segmented
items.description: pick one of a few options (a watchOS-style segmented control).

items.name: stat-grid
items.title: StatGrid
items.description: a compact grid of readouts for a multi-metric glance (a watch "complication cluster").

items.name: status-bar
items.title: StatusBar
items.description: the glanceable top status row (watchOS TimeText analog): time / battery / connection.

items.name: status-dot
items.title: StatusDot
items.description: a glanceable sensor / permission / connection indicator.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: adjust a value in discrete steps (glasses have no fine slider).

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: a transient notice that animates in (a brief luminance rise, not a modal scrim).

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: a binary switch, D-pad-focusable (renders a real button with the focusable class; useDpad activates it on Enter/Space).
